body_txt: When Child Services or Witness Protection is unable to take in a child or teenager, one of the investigators of the crime will take in the child, who is sometimes also one of the victims of said crime. This would lead to the two bonding, as the protector is either also a parent or someone who might be closed off. A character becoming the protector/caretaker of a young witness could reveal them as a Bruiser with a Soft Center . Expect a moment of Staying with the Suffering to appear, especially if the witness/victim is having nightmares . Can overlap with Babysitting Episode and with Parents for a Day when the caretakers in question are in law enforcement. Compare with Adopting the Abused , Parental Substitute , Honorary Uncle , or Family of Choice if the young victim/witness becomes attached enough to their protector to consider them family.
